top_signals.title: Another Trump victory: Republican Rep. Thomas Massie loses Kentucky primary
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump had targeted Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., for opposing GOP priorities.

top_signals.title: M&S profit slumps in fallout from cyber attack
top_signals.summary: Marks & Spencer saw its profit slump by a quarter as the retailer took more than a £100m hit from its “traumatic” cyber attack last year. The FTSE 100 supermarket and clothing business saw pre-tax profit fall by 29 per cent to £365m in the year to March, despite sales growing by 25 per cent [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
